## Source: amazon-inspector (7f2263a09a764a00c111f0baad35ef067d15ac1baaf92efd30cf27d86a4adc66)
The package shakti-strings was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (aa19f1d5261846b18a1a4f35020c31393119768f0856d30d87677c06fd680fe5)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'shakti-strings' @ 1.4.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
